translations.app.title: Red40 Clothing Repacker
translations.language.label: Language
translations.option.copyResources: Copy source resources to output before renaming
translations.option.copyResources.tooltip: This copies the original resources to the output folder, leaving the originals in place and modifying only the copies.
translations.option.optimizeYmt.tooltip: Rearranges component and prop lanes across generated YMTs to reduce the target count. Off by default because conservative mode keeps source packs grouped together and attempts to preserve relative source resource order.
translations.option.debugClient.tooltip: Includes a client-side debug script to verify that the target collections are loaded correctly.
translations.resource.orderHint: Top-to-bottom order is used for merge analysis.
translations.status.initial: Select clothing resource folders to begin.
translations.status.resourcesSelected: {count} resource folder(s) selected. Run Analyze to preview changes.
translations.status.exportComplete: XML export complete. Wrote {written} file(s), skipped {skipped}.
translations.status.analyzeErrors: Analyze complete with {count} error(s). Fix errors before build/apply.
translations.status.buildComplete: Build preview complete. Wrote {count} file(s) to {path}.
translations.status.applyComplete: Apply complete. Created {count} backup manifest entr(y/ies).
translations.status.cancelRequested: Cancel requested. Waiting for the current step to stop.
translations.status.resourceOrderUpdated: Resource order updated. Run Analyze to preview changes.
translations.status.backupManifestLoaded: Backup manifest loaded. {count} restore action(s) ready.
translations.log.activePath: Active path when the error occurred: {path}
translations.progress.foundCandidates: Found {candidates} YMT candidates across {resources} resource(s) and {files} stream file(s).
translations.progress.planningTargets: Planning target collections | sources {sources} | warnings {warnings} | errors {errors}
translations.progress.loadedSources: Loaded {sources} source YMT(s) into {targets} target collection(s).
translations.progress.removedMetadata: Removed {current}/{total} source metadata files from copy | {path}
translations.summary.title: {title} summary
translations.dialog.dropFolder: Drop resource folder paths or clothing resource folders.
translations.dialog.applyCopyMode: Apply will copy source resources into the output root, rename stream files in that copy, remove copied merged source YMT files after backing them up, and copy generated resources into place. Original resources will not be renamed.
translations.dialog.applyInPlace: Apply will rename stream files, remove merged source YMT files after backing them up, and copy generated resources into place.
translations.dialog.helpTitle: How to use Red40 Clothing Repacker
translations.dialog.helpSteps:
1. Add one or more clothing resource folders with Add Resource or drag and drop.
2. Set the merged resource name, target prefix, output location, and backup location.
3. Click Analyze and review the Summary, Warnings, and Errors tabs.
4. Click Build Preview to generate the merged output and inspect the results.
5. Click Apply when ready. Backups are written before source files are changed.
translations.dialog.moreHelp: Need more help or have feature suggestions?
translations.map.analyzeHint: Analyze resources to see the YMT repack map.
translations.cli.help:
clothing-repacker analyze --resources <path> --target-resource <name> --out <plan.json>
clothing-repacker analyze --resource <path> [--resource <path> ...] --generated-root <folder> --target-resource <name> --out <plan.json>
  [--max-drawables-per-component <128>] [--max-drawables-per-prop <255>]
  [--optimize-ymt-usage]
clothing-repacker build --plan <plan.json> --out <folder>
  [--include-ymt-xml <true|false>] [--include-debug-client <true|false>]
clothing-repacker apply --plan <plan.json> --backup-root <folder> [--copy-resources-to-output]
  [--include-ymt-xml <true|false>] [--include-debug-client <true|false>]
clothing-repacker restore --backup-manifest <backup-manifest.json>
clothing-repacker validate --plan <plan.json>
clothing-repacker validate --resources <path>
clothing-repacker validate --resource <path> [--resource <path> ...] --generated-root <folder>
clothing-repacker report --plan <plan.json> [--out <report.txt>]
clothing-repacker export-xml --folder <path> [--overwrite]

Global options:
  --no-version-check   Skip the GitHub update check.

Apply options:
  --copy-resources-to-output
                       Copy source resources into the plan's generated/output root
                       and rename the copies instead of modifying originals.

Analyze options:
  --optimize-ymt-usage
                       Split source YMT lanes across target collections when it
                       can reduce the total number of generated YMTs.
translations.cli.updateAvailable: Update available: {latest} is newer than {current}. Download: {url}
translations.cli.resourcesModeConflict: Use either --resources <parent> or repeated --resource <folder>, not both.
translations.cli.validateRequires: validate requires --plan, --resources, or at least one --resource.
translations.diagnostic.duplicateCompInfo: {path}: Component {component} has duplicate compInfo for drawable {drawable}.
translations.diagnostic.compInfoRange: {path}: Component {component} compInfo drawable index {drawable} is out of range.
translations.diagnostic.sourceExceedsCapacity: Source YMT exceeds configured drawable capacity and will be split across {count} target collections: {path}
translations.diagnostic.metadataUnreferenced: {path}: Creature metadata has no corresponding ShopPedApparel creatureMetaData reference and will be backed up without being merged.
translations.diagnostic.missingCreatureMetadata: {path}: ShopPedApparel creatureMetaData references missing creature metadata '{reference}' and generated creature metadata will be omitted for merged targets from resource '{resource}'.
translations.diagnostic.nonFreemodeSkipped: {path}: Non-freemode YMT skipped. It will only be copied to the generated resources root when copy-before-rename apply mode is enabled.
translations.error.resourcesRequired: At least one resource folder is required.
translations.error.generatedRootRequired: Generated resources root is required when analyzing explicit resource folders.
translations.error.drawableLimits: Drawable limits must be greater than zero.
translations.error.copyModeResourceRoots: Copy-to-output apply mode requires resource roots in the plan. Re-run analyze with the current version and try again.
